subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Praised be God, preserved and protected under the sheltering care of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید الحمد لله محفوظا مصونا در صون حمایت حضرت رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
